world.title: Indonesia presses ahead with giant sea wall project along Java coast

world.title: Ebola outruns containment in eastern Congo as contact tracing falters
world.description: Ebola is spreading faster than responders can track it in eastern Congo, where health workers managed to follow up with barely one in five identified contacts in a single day. Authorities in the Democratic Republic of Congo reported 83 confirmed infections, 746 suspected cases and 1,603 identified contacts as of May 21, according to the health ministry.
